description_long: This is a disposable coffee cup with a tapered cylindrical shape, featuring a brown paper exterior and a white plastic lid. The lid is domed with a small drinking slot, typical of takeaway coffee cups, and fits snugly over the rim. The cup's exterior displays printed text, including the word 'coffee' and 'Dark Roast', along with a cautionary note about hot contents. The surface of the cup is smooth and slightly glossy, with no visible handle. The cup is lightweight and designed for single use, commonly found in urban environments such as cafes, sidewalks, and parks. Its size suggests it is suitable for a standard serving of hot beverages like coffee or tea.
description: A brown disposable coffee cup with a white plastic lid and printed text, designed for takeaway hot beverages. The cup is smooth, tapered, and lacks a handle.
description_view_0: The cup is shown with its white lid fully visible and the brown body mostly plain, with part of the printed text partially visible on the left.
description_view_1: This view highlights the front of the cup, showing the 'coffee Dark Roast' text and the cautionary note near the rim, as well as the drinking slot on the lid.
description_view_2: The cup is rotated to show the opposite side, with the brown surface mostly plain and only a small portion of the printed text visible on the left edge.
description_view_3: Similar to view 1, this angle shows the 'coffee Dark Roast' text and the cautionary note, with the drinking slot on the lid more clearly visible.
